ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Negotiate Contract & Close.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(RecordType.Name = "Growth Opportunity") && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Negotiate Contract & Close") && (ISNULL(Verbal_Award_Date__c) || ISNULL(Expected_Sign_Date__c) || ISNULL(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Verbal Award Date, Expected Sign Date and Target Contract Start Date.
